SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-11-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:06am
Judge David Porter, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, The Dyno Garage appears through Ivan Mendoza. Respondent Nancy Guevara appears in pro per; Rosi Rodas appears as her interpreter. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Porter.

10:31am
Matter is taken under submission.
